compute_host_security.agent_coverage.edr.rationale: All compute instances must have EDR agents installed and running.

compute_host_security.agent_coverage.pat.rationale: Patch management agents must be installed and reporting status.

governance_compliance.tagging.ecs_cluste.rationale: Proper tagging enables governance and cost management.

identity_access.authentication.just_in_t.title: Just-in-time access is implemented for privileged accounts
identity_access.authentication.just_in_t.rationale: Just-in-time access reduces the attack surface by limiting privileged access duration.

identity_access.authentication.service_a.title: Service accounts use secure authentication mechanisms
identity_access.authentication.service_a.rationale: Service accounts are high-value targets for attackers. Secure authentication prevents service account compromise and lateral movement.

identity_access.authentication.legacy_au.title: Legacy authentication protocols are disabled
identity_access.authentication.legacy_au.rationale: Legacy authentication protocols have known vulnerabilities and weak security. Disabling them prevents exploitation of outdated authentication methods.

identity_access.authentication.privilege.title: Privileged access management is implemented
identity_access.authentication.privilege.rationale: Privileged access management prevents unauthorized access to critical systems and data.

identity_access.authentication.session_t.title: Session timeout is configured for interactive sessions
identity_access.authentication.session_t.rationale: Session timeouts limit exposure window for compromised sessions. Shorter timeouts reduce risk of unauthorized access from abandoned sessions.

identity_access.authentication.strong_au.title: Strong authentication methods are enabled for user accounts
identity_access.authentication.strong_au.rationale: Identity and access controls are fundamental to cloud security. Proper authentication and authorization prevent unauthorized access and reduce the risk of account compromise.

identity_access.authentication.zero_trus.title: Zero trust architecture principles are implemented
identity_access.authentication.zero_trus.rationale: Zero trust architecture ensures continuous verification and least privilege access.

identity_access.authorization.permission.title: Permission boundaries are enforced for privileged roles
identity_access.authorization.permission.rationale: Identity and access controls are fundamental to cloud security. Proper authentication and authorization prevent unauthorized access and reduce the risk of account compromise.

identity_access.authorization.service_ro.title: Service roles are used instead of long‑lived user access keys
identity_access.authorization.service_ro.rationale: Workloads should assume IAM roles to obtain short‑lived credentials. Long‑lived user access keys increase compromise risk and violate least privilege for services.

identity_access.authorization.conditiona.title: Conditional access policies are enabled
identity_access.authorization.conditiona.rationale: Identity and access controls are fundamental to cloud security. Proper authentication and authorization prevent unauthorized access and reduce the risk of account compromise.

identity_access.authorization.legacy_aut.title: Legacy and insecure authentication methods are disabled
identity_access.authorization.legacy_aut.rationale: Disabling legacy protocols and insecure auth flows prevents exploitation of outdated authentication mechanisms.

identity_access.authorization.session_ti.title: Sessions are constrained with strict timeouts and conditions
identity_access.authorization.session_ti.rationale: Short session lifetimes and conditional access reduce lateral movement opportunities and window of exposure.

identity_access.authorization.strong_aut.title: Strong authentication is enforced for access to identities
identity_access.authorization.strong_aut.rationale: Access control requires strong authentication to reduce account takeover risk across identity-aware services.

identity_access.authorization.resource_p.title: Resource-based policies are properly configured
identity_access.authorization.resource_p.rationale: Identity and access controls are fundamental to cloud security. Proper authentication and authorization prevent unauthorized access and reduce the risk of account compromise.

identity_access.break_glass.paw_workstat.title: Isolate privileged access workstations
identity_access.break_glass.paw_workstat.rationale: PAW workstations must be isolated from general network access.

identity_access.break_glass.break_glass_.title: Monitor all break-glass access attempts
identity_access.break_glass.break_glass_.rationale: All break-glass access must be logged and monitored in real-time.

identity_access.break_glass.emergency_ac.title: Review emergency access within 24 hours
identity_access.break_glass.emergency_ac.rationale: Emergency access must be reviewed and justified within 24 hours.

identity_access.break_glass.emergency_ac.title: Restrict emergency break-glass accounts
identity_access.break_glass.emergency_ac.rationale: Emergency accounts must be limited, monitored, and time-bound.

identity_access.break_glass.just_in_time.title: Implement just-in-time access for break-glass scenarios
identity_access.break_glass.just_in_time.rationale: Break-glass access must be time-limited and automatically revoked.

identity_access.federation.cross_account.title: Cross-account access is properly controlled
identity_access.federation.cross_account.rationale: Identity and access controls are fundamental to cloud security. Proper authentication and authorization prevent unauthorized access and reduce the risk of account compromise.

identity_access.federation.trust_relatio.rationale: Identity and access controls are fundamental to cloud security. Proper authentication and authorization prevent unauthorized access and reduce the risk of account compromise.

identity_access.federation.external_idp_.rationale: Identity and access controls are fundamental to cloud security. Proper authentication and authorization prevent unauthorized access and reduce the risk of account compromise.

identity_access.least_privilege.excess_p.rationale: Identity and access controls are fundamental to cloud security. Enforcing least privilege reduces blast radius and prevents privilege escalation.

identity_access.authentication.group_mfa.rationale: Group-based MFA ensures all privileged users have strong authentication.

identity_access.mfa.backup_methods_confi.title: Backup authentication methods are available for MFA
identity_access.mfa.backup_methods_confi.rationale: Identity and access controls are fundamental to cloud security. Proper authentication and authorization prevent unauthorized access and reduce the risk of account compromise.

identity_access.mfa.enforced_for_privile.title: MFA is enforced for all privileged user accounts

identity_access.passwordless_authn.biome.rationale: Mobile access must use biometric authentication where supported.

identity_access.passwordless_authn.cae_e.rationale: CAE must be enabled for high-value resources with real-time risk assessment.

identity_access.passwordless_authn.fido2.rationale: Admins must use FIDO2/WebAuthn or equivalent passwordless methods.

identity_access.passwordless_authn.hardw.title: Require hardware security keys for privileged access
identity_access.passwordless_authn.hardw.rationale: Privileged users must have hardware-based authentication factors.

identity_access.passwordless_authn.zero_.rationale: Authentication policies must enforce zero-trust principles with device trust.

identity_access.session_management.sessi.rationale: Identity and access controls are fundamental to cloud security. Proper authentication and authorization prevent unauthorized access and reduce the risk of account compromise.

identity_access.session_management.tempo.rationale: Identity and access controls are fundamental to cloud security. Proper authentication and authorization prevent unauthorized access and reduce the risk of account compromise.

rbac_entitlements.sod_toxic.financial_co.rationale: Financial approval, execution, and reconciliation must be separate roles.

rbac_entitlements.sod_toxic.periodic_sod.rationale: SOD violations must be reviewed and remediated quarterly.

rbac_entitlements.sod_toxic.segregate_ap.title: Segregate approval and execution roles
rbac_entitlements.sod_toxic.segregate_ap.rationale: Users cannot have both approval and execution permissions for same resources.

resilience_recovery.backup_strategy.auto.title: Automated backups are enabled
resilience_recovery.backup_strategy.auto.rationale: Resilience and recovery controls ensure business continuity and data protection in case of incidents or disasters.

resilience_recovery.backup_strategy.geog.rationale: Resilience and recovery controls ensure business continuity and data protection in case of incidents or disasters.

resilience_recovery.disaster_recovery.cr.title: Cross-region replication is enabled
resilience_recovery.disaster_recovery.cr.rationale: Resilience and recovery controls ensure business continuity and data protection in case of incidents or disasters.

resilience_recovery.disaster_recovery.dr.rationale: Resilience and recovery controls ensure business continuity and data protection in case of incidents or disasters.

resilience_recovery.disaster_recovery.rt.title: RTO and RPO are defined and monitored
resilience_recovery.disaster_recovery.rt.rationale: Resilience and recovery controls ensure business continuity and data protection in case of incidents or disasters.

resilience_recovery.high_availability.au.title: Auto-scaling is enabled for resilience
resilience_recovery.high_availability.au.rationale: Resilience and recovery controls ensure business continuity and data protection in case of incidents or disasters.

resilience_recovery.high_availability.he.rationale: Resilience and recovery controls ensure business continuity and data protection in case of incidents or disasters.

resilience_recovery.high_availability.lo.rationale: Resilience and recovery controls ensure business continuity and data protection in case of incidents or disasters.

resilience_recovery.ransomware_protectio.title: Maintain isolated recovery environment
resilience_recovery.ransomware_protectio.rationale: Recovery environment must be isolated from production to prevent reinfection.

resilience_recovery.ransomware_protectio.title: Enable point-in-time recovery
resilience_recovery.ransomware_protectio.rationale: Point-in-time recovery must be available for rapid restoration.

resilience_recovery.ransomware_protectio.title: Maintain air-gapped backup copies
resilience_recovery.ransomware_protectio.rationale: Critical backups must be stored in air-gapped environments.

resilience_recovery.ransomware_protectio.title: Create immutable backup copies
resilience_recovery.ransomware_protectio.rationale: Backups must be stored in immutable format to prevent ransomware encryption.

resilience_recovery.ransomware_protectio.title: Scan backups for malware
resilience_recovery.ransomware_protectio.rationale: Backups must be scanned for malware before restoration.

resilience_recovery.recovery_testing.bac.title: Backup restoration is regularly tested
resilience_recovery.recovery_testing.bac.rationale: Resilience and recovery controls ensure business continuity and data protection in case of incidents or disasters.

resilience_recovery.recovery_testing.dr_.rationale: Resilience and recovery controls ensure business continuity and data protection in case of incidents or disasters.

secrets_key_mgmt.key_protection.key_acce.title: Key access is logged and monitored
secrets_key_mgmt.key_protection.key_acce.rationale: Secrets and key management are critical for protecting sensitive data. Proper rotation and protection prevent unauthorized access to encrypted resources.

secrets_key_mgmt.secret_storage.encrypte.rationale: Secrets and key management are critical for protecting sensitive data. Proper rotation and protection prevent unauthorized access to encrypted resources.

serverless_paas.event_security.event_val.rationale: Serverless and PaaS security controls protect cloud-native applications and services from security vulnerabilities.

serverless_paas.function_security.runtim.rationale: Serverless and PaaS security controls protect cloud-native applications and services from security vulnerabilities.

serverless_paas.paas_security.platform_h.rationale: Serverless and PaaS security controls protect cloud-native applications and services from security vulnerabilities.

serverless_paas.secret_hygiene.audit_sec.rationale: Secret access by serverless functions must be audited and logged.

serverless_paas.secret_hygiene.least_pri.title: Apply least privilege to secret access
serverless_paas.secret_hygiene.least_pri.rationale: Functions must have minimal required permissions for secret access.

serverless_paas.secret_hygiene.no_plaint.title: Eliminate plaintext secrets in serverless configs
serverless_paas.secret_hygiene.no_plaint.rationale: Serverless functions must not contain plaintext secrets in environment variables.

serverless_paas.secret_hygiene.use_manag.title: Use managed secret references

serverless_paas.secret_management.enviro.rationale: Encrypting environment variables protects sensitive data.
